Package org.mitre.synthea.helpers

Interface RandomNumberGenerator

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultRandomNumberGenerator, Person
public interface RandomNumberGenerator
RandomNumberGenerator provides methods for generating random numbers with various distributions and ranges.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    getCount()
    Returns the number of times this random number generator has been called.
    long
    getSeed()
    Returns the seed value used by this random number generator.
    double
    rand()
    Returns a double between 0-1 from a uniform distribution.
    default double
    rand(double[] range)
    Helper function to get a random number based on an array of [min, max].
    default double
    rand(double low, double high)
    Returns a random double in the given range.
    default double
    rand(double low, double high, Integer decimals)
    Returns a random double in the given range with no more than the specified number of decimal places.
    default double
    rand(int[] range)
    Helper function to get a random number based on an integer array of [min, max].
    default String
    rand(String... choices)
    Return one of the options randomly with uniform distribution.
    boolean
    randBoolean()
    Returns a random boolean value.
    double
    randGaussian()
    Returns a double from a normal distribution with a mean of 0 and a standard deviation of 1.
    int
    randInt()
    Returns a random integer.
    int
    randInt(int bound)
    Returns a random integer within the given bound.
    long
    randLong()
    Returns a random long value.
    UUID
    randUUID()
    Returns a random UUID.

  • Method Details

    • rand

      double rand()
      Returns a double between 0-1 from a uniform distribution.
      Returns:
      a random double in the range [0.0, 1.0)

    • rand

      default double rand(double low, double high)
      Returns a random double in the given range.
      Parameters:
      low - the lower bound of the range
      high - the upper bound of the range
      Returns:
      a random double between low and high

    • rand

      default double rand(double low, double high, Integer decimals)
      Returns a random double in the given range with no more than the specified number of decimal places.
      Parameters:
      low - the lower bound of the range
      high - the upper bound of the range
      decimals - the number of decimal places to round to, or null for no rounding
      Returns:
      a random double between low and high, rounded to the specified number of decimal places

    • rand

      default double rand(double[] range)
      Helper function to get a random number based on an array of [min, max]. This should be used primarily when pulling ranges from YML.
      Parameters:
      range - array [min, max]
      Returns:
      random double between min and max

    • rand

      default String rand(String... choices)
      Return one of the options randomly with uniform distribution.
      Parameters:
      choices - The options to be returned.
      Returns:
      One of the options randomly selected.

    • rand

      default double rand(int[] range)
      Helper function to get a random number based on an integer array of [min, max]. This should be used primarily when pulling ranges from YML.
      Parameters:
      range - array [min, max]
      Returns:
      random double between min and max

    • randBoolean

      boolean randBoolean()
      Returns a random boolean value.
      Returns:
      a random boolean

    • randGaussian

      double randGaussian()
      Returns a double from a normal distribution with a mean of 0 and a standard deviation of 1.
      Returns:
      a random double from a standard normal distribution

    • randInt

      int randInt()
      Returns a random integer.
      Returns:
      a random integer

    • randInt

      int randInt(int bound)
      Returns a random integer within the given bound.
      Parameters:
      bound - the upper bound (exclusive) for the random integer
      Returns:
      a random integer between 0 (inclusive) and bound (exclusive)

    • randLong

      long randLong()
      Returns a random long value.
      Returns:
      a random long

    • randUUID

      UUID randUUID()
      Returns a random UUID.
      Returns:
      a random UUID

    • getCount

      long getCount()
      Returns the number of times this random number generator has been called.
      Returns:
      the count of random number generation calls

    • getSeed

      long getSeed()
      Returns the seed value used by this random number generator.
      Returns:
      the seed value
